message:
Add Cmd+Tab interception and improved cycling behavior

- Use Carbon RegisterEventHotKey to capture Cmd+Tab (bypasses Dock handler)
- Use CGEventTap to detect modifier release for cycling
- First shortcut press shows sidebar, keeps window open on release
- Second+ press enters cycling mode, activates on modifier release
- Shift+shortcut cycles backwards
- Disable system hotkeys while sidebar is active (CGSSetGlobalHotKeyOperatingMode)
- Add launch at login option using SMAppService
- Remove maximize feature
- Fix thread safety issues with MainActor.assumeIsolated
